top_signals.title: Oil Rebounds as Strikes Near Hormuz Muddy Outlook for Iran Deal
top_signals.summary: Oil rebounded as fresh US military strikes in Iran clouded the outlook for a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, with talks set to continue for several more days.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ROYC and Stilla Enter Strategic Partnership to Operationalise Agentic AI in Private Markets
top_signals.summary: ROYC today announced a partnership with Stilla.ai as the platform layer where ROYC will create, share and run its internally developed AI skills and agents. This operationalises the agentic AI strategy ROYC set out earlier, equipping every function across the company with the tools and resources to build and deploy their own AI agents and [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
